languages.text: "Благодать Омниссии да освятит место сие, таинство во имя Его да свершится..."
"Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."
languages.original_text: "Благодать Омниссии да освятит место сие, таинство во имя Его да свершится..."

traits.locale_text: "Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."
"Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."
"Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."

languages.text: 「全知なる神の名によってこの場所を聖なるものとし、彼の名による聖餐式を成就せよ…」
languages.original_text: "Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."

languages.text: "Bırakın Hermesih'in lütfu burayı takdis etsin, O'nun adına yapılan ayin tamamlansın..."
languages.original_text: "Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."

traits.locale_text: "Bırakın Hermesih'in lütfu burayı takdis etsin, O'nun adına yapılan ayin tamamlansın..."

languages.text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚的恩典圣化此地，以祂之名完成圣礼……”
languages.original_text: "Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."

traits.locale_text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚的恩典圣化此地，以祂之名完成圣礼……”

languages.text: "Möge die Gnade des Omnissiah diesen Ort segnen, auf dass das Sakrament in Seinem Namen vollzogen werde ..."
languages.original_text: "Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."

traits.locale_text: "Möge die Gnade des Omnissiah diesen Ort segnen, auf dass das Sakrament in Seinem Namen vollzogen werde ..."

languages.text: « Que la grâce de l'Omnimessie sanctifie ce lieu, que le sacrement en Son nom soit accompli… »
languages.original_text: "Let the grace of the Omnissiah sanctify this place, let the sacrament in His name be accomplished..."

traits.locale_text: « Que la grâce de l'Omnimessie sanctifie ce lieu, que le sacrement en Son nom soit accompli… »

languages.text: «Que la gracia del Omnissiah santifique este lugar y se alcance el sacramento en su nombre...».
